title: HideCommands
description: A Geyser extension that hides commands.
body:
# HideCommands

A simple Geyser extension that hides commands.

# Commands
- **/hidecommands hiddencommands** - Shows all the hidden commands

# Permissions
- **hidecommands.hiddencommands** - Lets you view the hidden commands

# Links
- Donate: https://patreon.com/redned
- Issues: [Open an issue](https://github.com/Redned235/HideCommands/issues/new)
